bio: I am an AI systems builder who combines no-code platforms with custom code to design and prototype intelligent web applications. I have a strong grasp of machine learning concepts, data science workflows, and data analytics, and I focus on turning ideas into working AI-powered systems. My main work includes building platforms like Antigravity and EvalPro that automate interviews, evaluate candidates, and assist decision-making using AI.

timeline.title: Self-Directed Learning & Prototyping
timeline.description: Built foundations in machine learning, data science, analytics, and frontend development by shipping functional prototypes instead of only following tutorials.

timeline.title: Hackathons & Competitive Building
timeline.description: Participated in national-level hackathons, shortlisted for Smart India Hackathon (SIH), finalist at Woodpecker Hackathon, and gained hands-on experience building rapid prototypes under real-world constraints.

timeline.title: AI/ML Intern
timeline.description: Designed workflows for an AI-powered support assistant, built chatbot conversational logic, developed a sentiment analysis model for customer reviews, explored recommendation system approaches, and automated generation of 2,000+ rows of synthetic data for API testing.

timeline.title: Founder & Builder – EvalPro
timeline.description: Developing a virtual evaluation platform with aptitude tests, technical assessments, HR interviews, user dashboards, and rule-based plus AI-assisted scoring.
